title: The Pandas line most beginners skip (don't)
description:
df.isnull().sum() before anything else. Missing data in a filter column silently removes rows — your analysis looks right but isn't. Know your nulls first.

Full Pandas tutorial in bio. #Shorts #Python #DataScience #Pandas
hook_visual: Terminal screen fills frame. Cursor types df.isnull().sum(). Output appears showing several columns with high null counts. Bold text overlay: 'Most beginners skip this line.'
end_screen_cta: Hold up the question: 'Have your nulls ever broken an analysis silently?' with a subscribe prompt and arrow pointing up.
